name: Blueprint
summary: Turn the enemy's worst nightmare into reality with Follie's signature rifle. The Enkaus will instantly kill and dissolve inked enemies that are damaged at low health. Shooting inked enemies siphons ink back into the Enkaus, allowing for a constant flow of creative destruction.
